channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock
item.description: Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-stateful-runtime-environment-for-agents-in-amazon-bedrock

item.title: Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft
item.description: Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/continuing-microsoft-partnership

item.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
item.description: OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/amazon-partnership

item.title: Scaling AI for everyone
item.description: Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/scaling-ai-for-everyone

item.title: Pacific Northwest National Laboratory and OpenAI partner to accelerate federal permitting
item.description: OpenAI and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory introduce DraftNEPABench, a new benchmark evaluating how AI coding agents can accelerate federal permitting—showing potential to reduce NEPA drafting time by up to 15% and modernize infrastructure reviews. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/pacific-northwest-national-laboratory

item.title: OpenAI Codex and Figma launch seamless code-to-design experience
item.description: OpenAI and Figma launch a new Codex integration that connects code and design, enabling teams to move between implementation and the Figma canvas to iterate and ship faster. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/figma-partnership

item.title: Disrupting malicious uses of AI | February 2026
item.description: Our latest threat report examines how malicious actors combine AI models with websites and social platforms—and what it means for detection and defense. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/disrupting-malicious-ai-uses

item.title: Arvind KC appointed Chief People Officer
item.description: OpenAI appoints Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company, strengthen its culture, and lead how work evolves in the age of AI. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/arvind-kc-chief-people-officer

item.title: Why we no longer evaluate SWE-bench Verified
item.description: SWE-bench Verified is increasingly contaminated and mismeasures frontier coding progress. Our analysis shows flawed tests and training leakage. We recommend SWE-bench Pro. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified

item.title: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners
item.description: OpenAI announces Frontier Alliance Partners to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production with secure, scalable agent deployments. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/frontier-alliance-partners

item.title: Our First Proof submissions
item.description: We share our AI model’s proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge, testing research-grade reasoning on expert-level problems. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/first-proof-submissions
